## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting behavior or architecture change.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`./mvnw test`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`npm test -- --watchAll=false`)
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Frontend production build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Documentation and migrations are updated when applicable
- [ ] No credentials, generated archives, or local environment files are included

## Notes

Call out migration order, native/manual validation, screenshots, known limitations,
or follow-up work relevant to reviewers.
